title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
summary: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.
title_es: Anthropic presenta Claude Mythos para ciberseguridad defensiva
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Mythos Preview como parte de Project Glasswing, una iniciativa de ciberseguridad que reúne a más de 45 organizaciones incluyendo Apple, Google, Microsoft y AWS. El modelo detectó vulnerabilidades en todos los sistemas operativos y navegadores principales, marcando un avance significativo en defensa de infraestructura crítica.
bajada_en: Anthropic launched Claude Mythos Preview as part of Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity initiative bringing together over 45 organizations including Apple, Google, Microsoft, and AWS. The model discovered vulnerabilities across all major operating systems and web browsers, marking a significant advancement in critical infrastructure defense.

title: Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era

title_es: OpenAI publica Blueprint de Seguridad Infantil
bajada: OpenAI lanzó su Child Safety Blueprint, una guía integral para desarrollar IA responsable con protecciones específicas para menores. El documento establece estándares para diseño apropiado por edad y colaboración entre desarrolladores y organizaciones de protección infantil.
bajada_en: OpenAI released its Child Safety Blueprint, a comprehensive guide for responsible AI development with protections specific to minors. The document establishes standards for age-appropriate design and collaboration between developers and child protection organizations.

title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
summary: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.
title_es: Nvidia destaca avances en robótica física con IA
bajada: Nvidia resaltó durante National Robotics Week los progresos en robot learning, simulación y foundation models que aceleran el desarrollo de robots en agricultura, manufactura y energía. Los avances permiten transitar más rápidamente del entrenamiento virtual a aplicaciones del mundo real.
bajada_en: Nvidia highlighted advances in robot learning, simulation, and foundation models during National Robotics Week that accelerate development in agriculture, manufacturing, and energy sectors. These breakthroughs enable faster transitions from virtual training to real-world deployment.

title: Introducing the Child Safety Blueprint
summary: Discover OpenAI’s Child Safety Blueprint—a roadmap for building AI responsibly with safeguards, age-appropriate design, and collaboration to protect and empower young people online.
title_es: Firmus, startup de data centers, alcanza valuación de $5.5B
bajada: Firmus, proveedor de data centers para IA en Asia respaldado por Nvidia, recaudó $1.35 mil millones en seis meses. La startup refleja la creciente demanda de infraestructura de computación especializada para entrenar y desplegar modelos de IA a escala.
bajada_en: Firmus, an Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider, raised $1.35 billion in six months, reaching a $5.5B valuation. The startup reflects growing demand for specialized computing infrastructure to train and deploy AI models at scale.

title: Unionized ProPublica staff are on strike over AI, layoffs, and wages
summary: Unionized staff at ProPublica, one of the country's leading nonprofit newsrooms, are walking off the job for 24 hours beginning Wednesday and asking the public to honor a digital picket line. The roughly 150 members of the ProPublica Guild are in the midst of negotiating a collective bargaining agreement after unionizing in 2023. The union […]
title_es: Google lanza LiteRT-LM con soporte para Gemma 4
bajada: Google actualizó LiteRT-LM, su framework de inferencia open source para desplegar LLMs en edge devices, agregando soporte para Gemma 4. La herramienta habilita a developers ejecutar modelos potentes localmente en Android, iOS, web y dispositivos IoT sin conexión.
bajada_en: Google updated LiteRT-LM, its open source inference framework for deploying LLMs on edge devices, adding Gemma 4 support. The tool enables developers to run powerful models locally on Android, iOS, web, and IoT devices offline.

title: Anthropic Teams Up With Its Rivals to Keep AI From Hacking Everything
summary: The AI lab's Project Glasswing will bring together Apple, Google, and more than 45 other organizations. They'll use the new Claude Mythos Preview model to test advancing AI cybersecurity capabilities.
title_es: Google AI Edge Gallery amplía acceso a modelos generativos
bajada: Google lanzó AI Edge Gallery, plataforma para ejecutar LLMs open source en dispositivos móviles con soporte para Gemma 4. La aplicación permite experiencias generativas completamente offline, privadas y rápidas directamente en hardware local.
bajada_en: Google launched AI Edge Gallery, a platform for running open source LLMs on mobile devices with Gemma 4 support. The app enables fully offline, private, and fast generative AI experiences directly on local hardware.

title: NVIDIA /personaplex
summary: PersonaPlex: Voice and Role Control for Full Duplex Conversational Speech Models PersonaPlex is a real-time, full-duplex speech-to-speech conversational model that enables persona control through text-based role prompts and audio-based voice conditioning. Trained on a combination of synthetic and real conversations, it produces natural, low-latency spoken interactions with a consistent persona. PersonaPlex is based on the Moshi architecture and weights. PersonaPlex Architecture Usage Prerequisites Install the Opus audio codec development library: # Ubuntu/Debian sudo apt install libopus-dev # Fedora/RHEL sudo dnf install opus-devel Installation Download this repository and install with: pip install moshi/. Extra step for Blackwell based GPUs as suggested in (See #2 ): pip install torch torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130 Accept Model License Log in to your Huggingface account and accept the PersonaPlex model license here . Then set up your Huggingface authentication: export HF_TOKEN= < YOUR_HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN > Launch Server Launch server for live interaction (temporary SSL certs for https): SSL_DIR= $( mktemp -d ) ; python -m moshi.server --ssl " $SSL_DIR " CPU Offload: If your GPU has insufficient memory, use the --cpu-offload flag to offload model layers to CPU. This requires the accelerate package ( pip install accelerate ): SSL_DIR= $( mktemp -d ) ; python -m moshi.server --ssl " $SSL_DIR " --cpu-offload Access the Web UI from a browser at localhost:8998 if running locally, otherwise look for the access link printed by the script: Access the Web UI directly at https://11.54.401.33:8998 Offline Evaluation For offline evaluation use the offline script that streams in an input wav file and produces an output wav file from the captured output stream. The output file will be the same duration as the input file. Add --cpu-offload to any command below if your GPU has insufficient memory (requires accelerate package). Or install cpu
bajada: PersonaPlex: Voice and Role Control for Full Duplex Conversational Speech Models PersonaPlex is a real-time, full-duplex speech-to-speech conversational model that enables persona control through text

title: google-ai-edge /LiteRT-LM
summary:
LiteRT-LM LiteRT-LM is Google's production-ready, high-performance, open-source inference
framework for deploying Large Language Models on edge devices. 🔗 Product Website 🔥 What's New: Gemma 4 support with LiteRT-LM Deploy Gemma 4 across a broad range of hardware with stellar performance
( blog ). 👉 Try on Linux, macOS, Windows (WSL) or Raspberry Pi with the LiteRT-LM CLI : litert-lm run  \
   --from-huggingface-repo=litert-community/gemma-4-E2B-it-litert-lm \
   gemma-4-E2B-it.litertlm \
   --prompt= " What is the capital of France? " 🌟 Key Features 📱 Cross-Platform Support : Android, iOS, Web, Desktop, and IoT (e.g.
Raspberry Pi). 🚀 Hardware Acceleration : Peak performance via GPU and NPU accelerators. 👁️ Multi-Modality : Support for vision and audio inputs. 🔧 Tool Use : Function calling support for agentic workflows. 📚 Broad Model Support : Gemma, Llama, Phi-4, Qwen, and more. 🚀 Production-Ready for Google's Products LiteRT-LM powers on-device GenAI experiences in Chrome , Chromebook Plus , Pixel Watch , and more. You can also try the Google AI Edge Gallery app to run
models immediately on your device. Install the app today from Google Play Install the app today from App Store 📰 Blogs & Announcements Link Description Bring state-of-the-art agentic skills to the edge with Gemma 4 Deploy Gemma 4 in-app and across a broader range of devices with stellar performance and broad reach using LiteRT-LM. On-device GenAI in Chrome, Chromebook Plus and Pixel Watch Deploy language models on wearables and browser-based platforms using LiteRT-LM at scale. On-device Function Calling in Google AI Edge Gallery Explore how to fine-tune FunctionGemma and enable function calling capabilities powered by LiteRT-LM Tool Use APIs. Google AI Edge small language models, multimodality, and function calling Latest insights on RAG, multimodality, and function calling for edge language models. 🏃 Quick Start 🔗 Key Links 👉 Technical Overview including performance benchmarks, model support, and m

framework for deploying Large Language Models on edge devices. 🔗 Product Website 🔥 What's New: Gemma 4 support

title: google-ai-edge /gallery
summary: Google AI Edge Gallery ✨ Explore, Experience, and Evaluate the Future of On-Device Generative AI with Google AI Edge. AI Edge Gallery is the premier destination for running the world's most powerful open-source Large Language Models (LLMs) on your mobile device. Experience high-performance Generative AI directly on your hardware—fully offline, private, and lightning-fast. Now Featuring: Gemma 4 The latest version brings official support for the newly released Gemma 4 family. As the centerpiece of this release, Gemma 4 allows you to test the cutting edge of on-device AI. Experience advanced reasoning, logic, and creative capabilities without ever sending your data to a server. Install the app today from Google Play Install the app today from App Store For users without Google Play access, install the apk from the latest release App Preview ✨ Core Features Agent Skills : Transform your LLM from a conversationalist into a proactive assistant. Use the Agent Skills tile to augment model capabilities with tools like Wikipedia for fact-grounding, interactive maps, and rich visual summary cards. You can even load modular skills from a URL or browse community contributions on GitHub Discussions. AI Chat with Thinking Mode : Engage in fluid, multi-turn conversations and toggle the new Thinking Mode to peek "under the hood." This feature allows you to see the model’s step-by-step reasoning process, which is perfect for understanding complex problem-solving. Note: Thinking Mode currently works with supported models, starting with the Gemma 4 family. Ask Image : Use multimodal power to identify objects, solve visual puzzles, or get detailed descriptions using your device’s camera or photo gallery. Audio Scribe : Transcribe and translate voice recordings into text in real-time using high-efficiency on-device language models. Prompt Lab : A dedicated workspace to test different prompts and single-turn use cases with granular control over model parameters like temperature and top-k
bajada: Google AI Edge Gallery ✨ Explore, Experience, and Evaluate the Future of On-Device Generative AI with Google AI Edge. AI Edge Gallery is the premier destination for running the world's most powerful o

title: A new Anthropic model found security problems ‘in every major operating system and web browser’
summary: Anthropic is debuting a new AI model as part of a cybersecurity partnership with Nvidia, Google, Amazon Web Services, Apple, Microsoft, and other companies. Project Glasswing, as it's called, is billed as a way for large companies, and potentially even the government, to flag vulnerabilities in their systems with virtually no human intervention. Anthropic is […]
title_es: Google lanza aplicación de dictado offline con Gemma
bajada: Google presentó silenciosamente una aplicación de dictado basada en IA que funciona completamente sin conexión usando modelos Gemma. La herramienta busca competir con alternativas como Whisper Flow ofreciendo privacidad y rendimiento en dispositivos locales.
bajada_en: Google quietly launched an offline-first dictation app powered by Gemma AI models. The tool aims to compete with alternatives like Whisper Flow by offering privacy and performance through on-device processing.

title: National Robotics Week — Latest Physical AI Research, Breakthroughs and Resources
summary: This National Robotics Week, NVIDIA is highlighting the breakthroughs that are bringing AI into the physical world — as well as the growing wave of robots transforming industries, from agricultural and manufacturing to energy and beyond. Advancements in robot learning, simulation and foundation models are accelerating development, enabling robots to move from training in virtual […]
title_es: Arcee gana tracción con modelos open source de alto desempeño
bajada: Arcee, una startup de 26 personas, construyó un LLM open source de alto rendimiento que gana popularidad en la comunidad OpenClaw. Su éxito demuestra que equipos pequeños pueden competir en desarrollo de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: Arcee, a 26-person startup, built a high-performing open source LLM gaining traction with OpenClaw users. Its success demonstrates that small teams can compete in AI model development.

title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI data center builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
summary: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.
title_es: ProPublica en huelga: preocupaciones sobre IA y despidos
bajada: La plantilla sindicalizada de ProPublica inició una huelga de 24 horas durante negociaciones laborales, citando preocupaciones sobre IA, despidos y salarios. El conflicto refleja tensiones crecientes en la industria de medios sobre la adopción de tecnología de IA.
bajada_en: ProPublica's unionized staff launched a 24-hour strike during labor negotiations, citing concerns about AI, layoffs, and wages. The conflict reflects growing tensions in the media industry over AI technology adoption.

title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
summary: Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.
title_es: Nvidia y Google liberan PersonaPlex para conversación de voz
bajada: Nvidia lanzó PersonaPlex, un modelo conversacional full-duplex en tiempo real que permite control de persona mediante prompts de texto y acondicionamiento de voz. La herramienta de código abierto basada en Moshi facilita interacciones de voz naturales y con baja latencia.
bajada_en: Nvidia released PersonaPlex, a real-time full-duplex conversational speech model enabling persona control through text prompts and voice conditioning. The open source tool based on Moshi architecture enables natural, low-latency voice interactions.
